# AgentRoom

> AgentRoom is the local-first terminal control room for seeing, launching, steering, and auditing long-running coding agents. Start with the TUI, then use CLI and MCP references when you need exact automation.

## Start

- [Ecosystem Tour](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=ecosystem): What users can do, what agents should handle, and the diagrams that explain the agent-first workspace.
- [Overview](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=overview): AgentRoom's local-first coordination model, repository layout, tech stack, and quick start.
- [Terminal TUI](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=tui): The human dashboard path: operator chat, views, hotkeys, and when to use the CLI instead.

## Setup

- [Setup Guide](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=setup): Install local tooling, choose room shape, runtime provider, agent harness, integrations, and skills.
- [Configuration Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=configuration): Typed topology, source-of-truth rules, env overrides, secrets, and TUI editing boundaries.
- [Room Topology](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=topology): Single-project rooms, HQ rooms, hybrids, gateway ownership, and state placement tradeoffs.

## Operations

- [Coordination Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=coordination): Native room messages, handoffs, status, task shadows, escalation, and external tracker split.
- [Runtime Providers](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=runtimes): Provider-neutral launch, read, send, stop, tmux, Herdr, fake runtimes, and future adapters.

## Reference

- [Protocol Notes](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=protocol): Agent opt-in environment, structured commands, local task shadows, and Linear bridge commands.
- [CLI Reference](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=cli-reference): Complete AgentRoom command map for operators, scripts, and agents that need exact commands.
- [Security Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=security): Runtime audit boundaries, scoped tokens, dangerous actions, transcript handling, and secrets.

## Architecture

- [Architecture](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=architecture): Core domain ownership, provider ports, adapters, configuration model, gateways, and daemon surfaces.
- [System Diagram](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=diagram): Docs-friendly end-to-end map of UIs, daemon, core, ports, adapters, and external systems.

## Planning

- [Roadmap](https://volpestyle.github.io/docs/agent-room/?doc=roadmap): Planned runtime, storage, gateway, provider, TUI, mobile, and policy milestones.
